tasks.subject: Fix design token foundation in index.css
tasks.description:
Wire up the full DESIGN.md token vocabulary as CSS custom properties in web/src/index.css.

Problems to fix:
1. Default theme is `retro-blue` — change to `raycast` (canvas=#07080a, correct Raycast values)
2. Add missing semantic CSS vars that DESIGN.md defines but don't exist: `--canvas`, `--surface`, `--surface-elevated`, `--surface-card`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-soft`, `--hairline-strong`, `--ink`, `--body-text`, `--mute`, `--ash`, `--stone`, `--on-dark`, `--on-dark-mute`, `--accent-blue`, `--accent-blue-soft`, `--accent-red`, `--accent-red-soft`, `--accent-green`, `--accent-green-soft`, `--accent-yellow`, `--accent-yellow-soft`
3. Register these in the `@theme inline` block so Tailwind utilities like `bg-canvas`, `bg-surface`, `text-ink`, `text-mute`, `border-hairline` etc. all work
4. Fix radius tokens: ensure `--radius-xs`=4px, `--radius-sm`=6px, `--radius-md`=8px, `--radius-lg`=10px, `--radius-xl`=16px AND that Tailwind's `rounded-xs/sm/md/lg/xl` map to these custom values (not Tailwind defaults)
5. Keep the existing Shadcn-compatible vars (`--background`, `--card`, etc.) mapped to the semantic vars so existing component code still compiles

DESIGN.md is at /home/sil/guppi/DESIGN.md — read colors section carefully.
Target file: /home/sil/guppi/web/src/index.css

metadata.result:
All changes applied successfully. Here's a summary:

**File:** `web/src/index.css`

**Changes made:**

1. **Replaced the entire `:root` block** — Removed all `retro-blue` oklch values. Added the full Raycast token vocabulary from DESIGN.md as CSS custom properties:
   - **Surface tokens**: `--canvas` (#07080a), `--surface` (#0d0d0d), `--surface-elevated` (#101111), `--surface-card` (#121212)
   - **Hairline tokens**: `--hairline` (#242728), `--hairline-soft`, `--hairline-strong`
   - **Text tokens**: `--ink`, `--body-text`, `--charcoal`, `--mute`, `--ash`, `--stone`, `--on-dark`, `--on-dark-mute`
   - **Brand tokens**: `--primary` (#ffffff), `--primary-pressed`, `--on-primary` (#000000), `--button-fg`
   - **Accent tokens**: all 8 accent-blue/red/green/yellow + soft variants
   - **Extra tokens**: `--hero-stripe-start/end`, `--key-bg-start/end`
   - **Shadcn-compatible vars** (`--background`, `--foreground`, `--card`, etc.) all mapped to the semantic tokens so existing component code still compiles

2. **Updated `@theme inline` block** — Added `--color-canvas`, `--color-surface`, `--color-surface-elevated`, `--color-surface-card`, `--color-hairline`, `--color-hairline-soft`, `--color-hairline-strong`, `--color-ink`, `--color-body-text`, `--color-charcoal`, `--color-mute`, `--color-ash`, `--color-stone`, `--color-on-dark`, `--color-on-dark-mute`, `--color-accent-blue`, `--color-accent-blue-soft`, `--color-accent-red`, `--color-accent-red-soft`, `--color-accent-green`, `--color-accent-green-soft`, `--color-accent-yellow`, `--color-accent-yellow-soft`. Tailwind utilities like `bg-canvas`, `bg-surface`, `text-ink`, `text-mute`, `border-hairline` will now resolve correctly.

3. **Radius tokens verified correct** — `--radius-xs: 4px`, `--radius-sm: 6px`, `--radius-md: 8px`, `--radius-lg: 10px`, `--radius-xl: 16px` — these were already present and correct.

Everything below the `@theme inline` block (base styles, scrollbars, animations, terminal-keybar classes) is untouched.

tasks.subject: Add semantic tokens to raycast theme preset in theme.ts
tasks.description:
Update /home/sil/guppi/web/src/theme.ts so the raycast ThemePreset.cssVars includes ALL DESIGN.md tokens as CSS vars — not just the Shadcn generic ones.

Add to the raycast preset's cssVars:
- `--canvas`: `#07080a`
- `--surface`: `#0d0d0d`
- `--surface-elevated`: `#101111`
- `--surface-card`: `#121212`
- `--hairline`: `#242728`
- `--hairline-soft`: `rgba(255,255,255,0.08)`
- `--hairline-strong`: `rgba(255,255,255,0.16)`
- `--ink`: `#f4f4f6`
- `--body-text`: `#cdcdcd`
- `--mute`: `#9c9c9d`
- `--ash`: `#6a6b6c`
- `--stone`: `#434345`
- `--on-dark`: `#ffffff`
- `--on-dark-mute`: `rgba(255,255,255,0.72)`
- `--accent-blue`: `#57c1ff`
- `--accent-blue-soft`: `rgba(87,193,255,0.15)`
- `--accent-red`: `#ff6161`
- `--accent-red-soft`: `rgba(255,97,97,0.15)`
- `--accent-green`: `#59d499`
- `--accent-green-soft`: `rgba(89,212,153,0.15)`
- `--accent-yellow`: `#ffc533`
- `--accent-yellow-soft`: `rgba(255,197,51,0.15)`
- `--hero-stripe-start`: `#ff5757`
- `--hero-stripe-end`: `#a1131a`

Also remap existing vars to these semantics where meaningful:
- `--background` → `var(--canvas)` (maps to #07080a)
- `--card` → `var(--surface)`
- `--popover` → `var(--surface-elevated)`
- `--border` → `var(--hairline)`
- `--foreground` → `var(--ink)`

Do the same for the other theme presets using best-effort approximations (they don't need to match DESIGN.md exactly — just not be broken).

Read /home/sil/guppi/DESIGN.md colors section before starting.

metadata.result:
All done. Here's a summary of the changes made to `/home/sil/guppi/web/src/theme.ts`:

**Raycast preset** — Added 24 exact DESIGN.md semantic tokens (`--canvas`, `--surface`, `--surface-elevated`, `--surface-card`, `--hairline`, `--hairline-soft`, `--hairline-strong`, `--ink`, `--body-text`, `--mute`, `--ash`, `--stone`, `--on-dark`, `--on-dark-mute`, `--accent-blue`, `--accent-blue-soft`, `--accent-red`, `--accent-red-soft`, `--accent-green`, `--accent-green-soft`, `--accent-yellow`, `--accent-yellow-soft`, `--hero-stripe-start`, `--hero-stripe-end`). Remapped the 5 specified Shadcn vars (`--background`, `--foreground`, `--card`, `--popover`, `--border`) plus all other matching vars (`--muted`, `--input`, `--sidebar`, etc.) to reference the new semantic tokens via `var()`.

**Other 5 presets** (retro-blue, dark, light, green-phosphor, midnight) — Added the same 24 semantic tokens with best-effort oklch approximations derived from each theme's existing palette, and applied the same var() remaps. All values are coherent with each theme's color scheme.

No functional regressions: `cssVars` type is still `Record<string, string>`, `applyTheme()` and `getXtermTheme()` work unchanged.

tasks.subject: Update components to use DESIGN.md tokens
tasks.description:
Update the core UI components to use the proper DESIGN.md token classes instead of ad-hoc Tailwind arbitrary values.

**Scope:** TopBar.tsx, Sidebar.tsx, Overview.tsx (first 150 lines is enough for Overview — focus on the stat cards and layout)

**Rules from DESIGN.md:**
- Surface hierarchy: `bg-canvas` < `bg-surface` < `bg-surface-elevated` < `bg-surface-card`
- Borders: always `border-hairline` (1px `#242728`), never drop shadows
- Text: `text-ink` for primary, `text-body-text` for body, `text-mute` for metadata, `text-ash` for disabled
- Nav bar (TopBar) should use `bg-canvas` + `border-hairline` bottom — NOT `bg-card`
- Sidebar should use `bg-canvas` background, `bg-surface` for selected item (not `bg-card`)
- Replace `rounded-sm` → `rounded-sm` (6px custom), `rounded-md` → `rounded-md` (8px custom), `rounded-lg` → `rounded-lg` (10px custom) — these will now resolve to the custom DESIGN.md values after task #1
- Replace ad-hoc text sizes like `text-[11px]`, `text-[10px]`, `text-[13px]` with proper Tailwind text tokens where possible:
  - 12px → `text-xs`
  - 13px → `text-[13px]` keep (caption-md)
  - 14px → `text-sm`
  - 16px → `text-base`

**Do not** change component logic, props, or behaviour. Only class names and inline styles where they hardcode values that should come from tokens.

For inline `style={{}}` that uses hardcoded colors like `#ff6161`, leave them if they're using `toolColors` or `statusConfig` lookups — those are data-driven. Remove hardcoded ones that should be design tokens.

Dependencies: tasks #1 and #2 should be done first so the new class names resolve. But this task can proceed in parallel since we're just writing the right class names.
